section_title: When Registrar or Sub-Registrar to be deemed a Civil Court
chapter_title: Provisions As To Offences Affecting The Administration Of Justice
text: When the State Government so directs, any Registrar or any Sub-Registrar appointed under the *** Registration Act, 1908 (16 of 1908), shall be deemed to be a civil Court within the meaning of sections 345 and 346.
